completion.thankYouMessage: Thank you for your participation. Your data has been successfully recorded and saved.
completion.safeToClose: You may now safely close this browser window.

notFound.title: 404 – Page not found
notFound.message: Please check the URL link or contact your administrator.

inactive.title: Protocol Inactive
inactive.message: This assignment is currently inactive or has expired.

invalidToken.title: Invalid token
invalidToken.message: The token is invalid. Please check the URL link or contact your administrator.

micCheck.permissionWarning: In the next step, your browser will ask for microphone access.
micCheck.permissionInstruction: Please click Allow in the popup window so we can record your vocal tasks.
micCheck.noiseInstructions:
In this task, your microphone and your surroundings will be tested.

First, count slowly and out loud from 1 to 5, then remain completely silent. The task will finish automatically after 12 seconds. Click START to begin.
micCheck.noiseInstructionsCounting: Count slowly and out loud from 1 to 5.
micCheck.noiseInstructionsSilence: Now remain completely silent until the timer finishes.
micCheck.failedMessage: Too much sound in your surroundings was detected.
micCheck.failedInstructions: To get the best results, please move to a quieter room or close any open windows. Once it is quiet, you can try the check again.
micCheck.mutedMessage: We couldn't hear anything during the microphone check.
micCheck.mutedInstructions: To fix this, please make sure your microphone is not muted, unplug any headphones, and check your device settings. Once ready, you can try the check again.
micCheck.noSpeechMessage: We couldn't hear your voice clearly during the counting task.
micCheck.noSpeechInstructions: To fix this, please speak slowly and out loud while counting from 1 to 5. Once ready, you can try the check again.
micCheck.successMessage: Your surroundings are quiet and your microphone is set up correctly.
micCheck.successInstructions: To ensure the best recording, please stay in this quiet area until you have finished all the tasks.

guide.descBrowser: To record your voice, this website needs permission to use your microphone.
guide.descSystem: Your phone's security settings are blocking the browser.
guide.descBusy: Another app (like Zoom or a call) is using your microphone.
guide.descMissing: We can't find a microphone. Please check your connection.
guide.descGeneric: Microphone access is required to proceed.

android.browser:
• At the top left next to the website name, tap the setting icon
• Select Permissions
• Switch Microphone to ON or click on Reset Permissions.
android.system:
• Open Phone Settings.
• Go to Apps > Chrome > Permissions.
• Set Microphone to Allow.
android.hardware:
• Check your plug or Bluetooth connection.
• Ensure the mic doesn't have a physical mute switch on.

ios.browser:
• At the bottom left next to the website name, tap the setting icon.
• Tap Website Settings.
• Set Microphone to Allow.
ios.system:
• Open Phone Settings.
• Go to Privacy & Security > Microphone.
• Ensure the switch for Chrome is ON.
ios.hardware:
• Close other calls (Phone/FaceTime) or recording apps.
• Check your connection or Bluetooth.

incompatibleBrowser.title: Browser Not Supported
incompatibleBrowser.description: does not support microphone access required for this task.
incompatibleBrowser.instruction: Copy the link below and open it in one of these browsers:
incompatibleBrowser.fallbackPrompt: Copy this link and open it in Chrome, Safari, Opera or Edge:

auth.signupDesc: Enter your details to start the protocol.
auth.note: We will send login credentials to your email.
auth.welcomeSubtitle:
Please sign up or log in to participate.
Registered users: use your sent unique link or credentials.
New users: your access details will be emailed after registration.
auth.resetEmailSent: Reset link was sent to your email.
auth.forgotPasswordInstruction: Reset link will be sent to your email.
auth.nameTooShort: Please enter your full name (first and last)
auth.underAge: You must be at least 18 years old to participate.
auth.overAge: Please enter a valid birth date.
auth.signupSuccessDetail: Your credentials and unique access link have been sent to your email.
auth.spamNote: Please check your spam folder if you don't see it shortly.
auth.smartphoneNote: For the best experience, please scan the QR code using your smartphone.
auth.futureDateError: Birth date cannot be in the future

email.assignedProtocol: You have been assigned a new research protocol.
email.manualLogin: If you need to log in manually later
email.resetRequested: You requested to reset your password. Click the button below to proceed.
email.adminWelcomeBody: You have been registered as a system administrator. Please use your email and the temporary password below to log in and set up your permanent password.
